name: General Business Credit Aggregation

eligibility.description: Available to businesses engaged in qualifying activities defined in the 40+ sub-credits listed in Section 38(b).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to combine multiple business-specific credits (e.g., R&D, Work Opportunity, Low-Income Housing) into a single credit to offset up to 75% of net income tax liability.
